query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE 'Guest-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guest_names,
  SUM(CASE WHEN name NOT LIKE 'Guest-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_names
FROM users
